subject: refactor(theme): replace hardcoded PRICE_COLORS with DaisyUI theme tokens
body:
Staleness indicators and toast backgrounds now use theme-aware colors
that adapt to light/dark mode. Maps fresh→success, aging→info,
stale→warning via STALENESS_COLOR_KEYS lookup.

- PRICE_COLORS (static hex) → STALENESS_COLOR_KEYS (theme key mapping)
- PriceDisplay: resolves staleness color via useTheme().colors
- PriceEditor: same pattern, colors already available from useTheme
- Toast: success/warning backgrounds now use themeColors.success/warning
  instead of hardcoded #16A34A/#CA8A04

Tags: theme, refactor, consistency, ui
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme
Semver: patch
